name: Potato Pie Dessert (Irish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the potatoes until lump-free.
2. Separate the yolks and whites of the eggs; beat them separately.
- Beat the yolks until lemon-colored.
- Beat the whites until stiff.
3. Add the almonds, orange extract, sugar, and egg yolks to the mashed potatoes; mix well.
4. Pour in the whiskey and combine thoroughly.
5. Gently fold in the egg whites.
6. Grease a cake pan with butter or prepare two pie crusts.
7. Line the bottom of the pan (or crusts) with parchment paper.
8. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan(s).
9. Bake at 375°F for 40-45 minutes.
